title: Portuguese Cheese Bake
description: A delicious vegetarian bake dish inspired by Portuguese flavors, featuring a blend of cheeses and spices.
instructions: Slice the fire-roasted red bell peppers and set aside.
Slice the fired wood-fired tomatoes and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the sliced red bell peppers and cook for 2-3 minutes until tender.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the Portuguese cheese, dreamy feta cheese, and cooked red bell pepper mixture.
Add the sliced fired wood-fired tomatoes to the bowl and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with chopped parsley.
Bake for 25-30 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
